top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE r.year = 2010 
  AND r.name LIKE '%Grand Prix%'
  AND c.country NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT country 
    FROM circuits 
    WHERE country IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT country 
      FROM circuits 
      WHERE country LIKE '%Asia%' OR country LIKE '%Europe%' OR country IN (
        'Afghanistan', 'Armenia', 'Azerbaijan', 'Bahrain', 'Bangladesh', 'Bhutan', 'Brunei', 'Cambodia', 'China', 'Cyprus', 'Georgia', 'India', 'I...

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE r.year = 2010 
  AND r.name LIKE '%Grand Prix%'
  AND c.country NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT country 
    FROM circuits 
    WHERE country IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT country 
      FROM circuits 
      WHERE country IN (
        'Asia', 'Europe'
      )
    )
  );
